name: Cheeseburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Brown the ground beef and onions in a pan until no longer pink. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add the tomato sauce and catsup to the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into a rectangular baking dish.
5. Sprinkle slices of American cheese over the top.
6. Unroll the crescent rolls and arrange them flat on top of the cheese.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until the crust is browned.
